content.en:
After a piece of Tongtian True Gold was refined by Ye Tian, it was integrated into the first immeasurable bone, and this immeasurable bone began to slowly transform.

The original limit of quality has been gradually broken, and the immeasurable bone is undergoing an incredible transformation.

Rumble!!!!

The metamorphosis is complete.

This first immeasurable bone was completely achieved into a super-immeasurable bone, which was a quality that countless Great Ancestors did not dare to believe or even heard of.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian took out the second piece of Tongtian True Gold and continued to merge into the immeasurable bone.

In this way, Ye Tian's immeasurable bones have been integrated into Tongtian True Gold, and every immeasurable bone has become a super-quality.

At the beginning, a small number of immeasurable bones became super quality, which did not help Ye Tian's strength much.

But as more and more Infinite Bones metamorphosed into super-quality, his flesh and blood body also began to change, not only with greater potential, but also with greater strength.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian finally used three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Tongtian True Gold to raise the immeasurable bones in his whole body to super quality.

Rumble!!!

The immeasurable bones of the whole body began to oscillate, and began to affect the immeasurable blood of the whole body.

"Infinite bone hematopoiesis, now the whole body of the immeasurable bone has achieved super-quality, after the influence of immeasurable bone, these 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood will slowly break the boundaries and become super-quality immeasurable blood. "

Ye Tian reasoned.

But this will take a long time, not a short time.

Of course, he can also speed up this process, such as obtaining treasures that can break the boundaries of immeasurable blood, but Ye Tian doesn't have those treasures now!

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to let the immeasurable blood transform, it would take a long time for him to reach the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform realm.

By that time, the transformation of the immeasurable blood would have been completed, so there was no need to worry about it.

......

this day.

Ye Tian received an invitation, which was an invitation from Taichen Palace.

"Fair!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Taichen Palace's trade fair, so he contacted the Blood Ancestor to inquire.

The Bloody Great Ancestor said: "Endless Great Ancestor, I know about the Taichen Palace's trade fair, but my previous cultivation was too low, so I was not qualified to participate. My master had participated in it before he became a Heavenly Ancestor, but then he didn't look down on such a trade fair. For the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, participating in such a trade fair is also an opportunity, and they may be able to trade the treasure resources they need. "

"There shouldn't be many fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Xuanqi Realm, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's true that there aren't many, top forces like Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Hai, there are at most about a dozen high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage, but there are many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage of Taichen Palace, and there are even many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fifth stage. In addition, there are Heavenly Ancestors in Taichen Palace, and there are three Heavenly Ancestors. Therefore, Taichen Palace has come into contact with many realms like the Xuanqi Realm. This trade fair is naturally not a trade fair within our Xuanqi Territory, but also involves other realms, so there are many great ancestors who participate in the trade fair. "

As soon as the Blood Ancestor said this, Ye Tian understood.

At this time, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor said again: "Endless Ancestor, I am also going to participate in the trade fair!"

"I'll go too!"

Ye Tian said.

He also lacked some materials that would save time and effort if they could be traded at the fair.

......

Time passed, and soon it was the day of the Taichen Palace Trade Fair, and the location of the trade fair was not in the Xuanqi Territory, so it was necessary to leave the Xuanqi Territory from a passage mastered by the Taichen Palace and go to the address of the Fair.

Too green mountain.

This is a very famous treasure in the Xuanqi Territory, and it is also owned by the Taichen Palace, and it is also one of the entrances to this fair.

Buzz Buzz!!

A fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform descended here.

The Xuanxin Great Ancestor of the Xuanqi Pavilion, the Camel Mountain Great Ancestor of the Outer Realm Alliance, and the fourth-stage Great Ancestors of other top forces in the Xuanqi Territory all descended here.

They also want to trade the treasures they need through this fair.

Soon, Ye Tian also came here.

And after Ye Tian came here, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor also came.

Swish!!!

The eyes of the fourth-stage Great Ancestor were fixed on the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, which made the Raccoon Blood Ancestor feel pressured.

"Everyone, this is the territory of Taichen Palace!"

The Blood Ancestor said with a smile.

The territory of Taichen Palace, if these great ancestors dare to make a move, they will undoubtedly offend Taichen Palace.

In addition, this is a trade fair held by Taichen Palace, if you fight here, it will undoubtedly disrupt the normal holding of the fair, and it will completely offend Taichen Palace.

Once the Taichen Palace is punished, even the Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Sea will be very troublesome.

Therefore, these Great Ancestors just glared at the Blood Great Ancestor.

Of course, even if they were really asked to kill the Blood Ancestor, they still wouldn't dare to kill it, at most they would suppress the Blood Ancestor, otherwise if the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor came back one day and found that the Blood Ancestor had fallen, thus angering them, then they would be dead.

This is also the reason why the Raccoon Blood Ancestor jumped so much and did a lot of things that offended the major forces, but he is still alive.

Whew!!

One by one, the Great Ancestor passed through the passage and left the Xuanqi Realm.

In the depths of unknown time and space, in front of a majestic gate, one after another great ancestors came here.

They need to pull out the invitation before they can walk through the gate and officially enter the place of trading.

Ye Tian took out the invitation, walked into the gate immediately, and was directly teleported to a giant city.

There were no other creatures in this giant city, only the many great ancestors who came to participate in the fair.

"I can't perceive anything outside of this giant city, it seems that this giant city is an independent time and space, similar to a territory, but it is very small!"

Ye Tian felt that he couldn't break the barriers outside the giant city, this should be established by the Heavenly Ancestors of Taichen Palace.

In the past, he didn't know much about Taichen Palace, but he felt that it was a powerful force than Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Sea.

But at this moment, he felt that Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Sea were far from being able to compare with Taichen Palace at all.

Jiuyang Sea and Xuanqi Pavilion are still mixed within the Xuanqi Territory, but Taichen Palace has already jumped out of the Xuanqi Territory and moved towards the major territories, how powerful the forces are, I'm afraid even the Xuanqi Pavilion and other forces don't know.

As time passed, more and more Fourth Stage and even Fifth Stage Great Ancestors came here.

Suddenly.

A familiar figure appeared here, but the other party was not the Great Ancestor of the Xuanqi Realm, but one of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that he had seen in the Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor Palace last time, and the other party had also come to participate in this trade fair.

Ye Tian saw each other, and the other party also saw Ye Tian, but they didn't say hello, after all, everyone was not familiar with each other.

It's been a while, and the fair is finally going to begin!
